subparts.text: What are the characteristics of mosaics in the language of landscape ecology? 2.5
Describe the physical characteristics of two trees commonly seen in the designed public landscapes of Delhi. 2.5
According to the major faiths across the world, what is the origin of Gardens? Cite examples. 2.5
Explain the design significance of Central Park. 2.5
What are the components of a hydroponic systems? Use diagrams. 2.5
How is 3D printing helpful in different stages of landscape design? 2.5

questions.question_text: In the language of landscape ecology what are the main elements? Explain diagrammatically patch dynamics and the characteristics of edges.
Explain the concept of urban ecosystem with the help of graphics. Explain with sketches the fundamental factors of consideration for landscape design in a topographically elevated urban area. ,
What will be the considerations of fundamental design factors and natural resources to design a residential campus in an Indian town with composite climate?
Determine the hardscape and the softscape elements for an institutional campus of architecture in the foothills of the Himalayas in India.
Compare and contrast between the Persian Gardens and the Moghul Gardens.
Mention one garden style each from the oriental and the occidental styles of gardens that used the concept of borrowed landscapes. Explain their salient features with the help of sketches.
Justify how India represents herself as a strong symbol of eco feminism. Give historical references to justify your answer.
Show ten points of comparison between hydroponic vs. aquaponics.
